name: Lighter Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray an 8 1/2 by 4 1/2 inch loaf pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and mace. Mix well and set aside.
4. In a mixing bowl, cream margarine (or corn oil) and sugar together until smooth.
5. Add egg whites and vanilla; blend until smooth.
6. Alternately add the flour mixture and buttermilk to the batter in two additions each, blending well after each addition.
7. Spoon the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 1 hour.
8. Let cake cool before slicing.
This was a first place winner in the pound cake division at the Del Mar County Fair, 1993. Jo Anne Merrill
